description: Standard AWS 3-tier architecture with load balancer

expected_attack_paths.rationale: ALB provides load balancing but no WAF, apps can be exploited, direct DB access
Redundant path through App2, same vulnerabilities

ransomware.rationale: Network segmentation helps but no backup or EDR visible

application_vulns.rationale: No WAF, Internet-facing ALB, unknown patch status

insider_threat.rationale: Subnet segmentation provides some isolation but no access controls visible

dos.rationale: ALB provides some protection, multiple app servers (redundancy)

rationale: Standard AWS architecture with basic segmentation and load balancing, but missing key security controls (WAF, MFA, EDR, backup)
